
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8" />
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0"/>
  <title>Vadsola Dental Clinic</title>
  <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Playfair+Display:wght@400;700;900&family=DM+Sans:wght@300;400;500;600&display=swap" rel="stylesheet"/>
  <style>
    *, *::before, *::after { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }
    :root {
      --navy: #0d2340; --teal: #0b8c8c; --teal-light: #12b5b5;
      --gold: #c9a84c; --cream: #faf8f4; --white: #ffffff; --gray: #6b7280; --light: #f0f7f7;
    }
    html { scroll-behavior: smooth; }
    body { font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif; background-color: var(--cream); color: var(--navy); overflow-x: hidden; }
    nav { position: fixed; top: 0; left: 0; right: 0; z-index: 100; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.93); backdrop-filter: blur(12px); padding: 18px 40px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(11,140,140,0.12); }
    .nav-logo { font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif; font-size: 1.3rem; font-weight: 700; color: var(--navy); }
    .nav-logo span { color: var(--teal); }
    .nav-links { display: flex; gap: 32px; list-style: none; }
    .nav-links a { text-decoration: none; font-size: 0.88rem; font-weight: 500; color: var(--navy); transition: color 0.2s; }
    .nav-links a:hover { color: var(--teal); }
    .nav-cta { background: var(--teal); color: white; padding: 10px 22px; border-radius: 50px; font-size: 0.85rem; font-weight: 600; text-decoration: none; transition: background 0.2s; }
    .nav-cta:hover { background: var(--teal-light); }
    .hero { min-height: 100vh; background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--navy) 0%, #163d5c 60%, #0b5a6e 100%); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; text-align: center; padding: 120px 24px 80px; position: relative; overflow: hidden; }
    .hero::before { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: 0; background: radial-gradient(ellipse 80% 60% at 50% 40%, rgba(11,140,140,0.18) 0%, transparent 70%); }
    .hero-badge { display: inline-block; background: rgba(201,168,76,0.15); border: 1px solid rgba(201,168,76,0.4); color: var(--gold); font-size: 0.78rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 2px; text-transform: uppercase; padding: 7px 18px; border-radius: 50px; margin-bottom: 28px; animation: fadeUp 0.8s ease both; }
    .hero h1 { font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif; font-size: clamp(2.8rem, 6vw, 5rem); font-weight: 900; color: white; line-height: 1.1; letter-spacing: -1px; animation: fadeUp 0.8s 0.15s ease both; }
    .hero h1 span { color: var(--teal-light); }
    .hero-sub { font-size: 1.1rem; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.7); margin-top: 16px; font-weight: 300; animation: fadeUp 0.8s 0.3s ease both; }
    .hero-card { margin-top: 48px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.07); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.13); backdrop-filter: blur(16px); border-radius: 20px; padding: 30px 40px; display: inline-block; animation: fadeUp 0.8s 0.45s ease both; }
    .hero-card h2 { font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif; font-size: 1.5rem; color: white; }
    .hero-card p { color: rgba(255,255,255,0.65); margin-top: 6px; font-size: 0.95rem; }
    .contact-info { margin-top: 18px; display: flex; gap: 14px; justify-content: center; flex-wrap: wrap; }
    .contact-chip { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.08); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.15); border-radius: 50px; padding: 8px 16px; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.85); font-size: 0.83rem; }
    .hero-btns { margin-top: 36px; display: flex; gap: 14px; justify-content: center; flex-wrap: wrap; animation: fadeUp 0.8s 0.6s ease both; }
    .btn-primary { background: var(--teal); color: white; padding: 14px 30px; border-radius: 50px; font-weight: 600; font-size: 0.95rem; text-decoration: none; transition: all 0.2s; display: inline-block; }
    .btn-primary:hover { background: var(--teal-light); transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: 0 8px 24px rgba(11,140,140,0.35); }
    .btn-outline { background: transparent; color: white; padding: 14px 30px; border-radius: 50px; font-weight: 600; font-size: 0.95rem; text-decoration: none; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.35); transition: all 0.2s; display: inline-block; }
    .btn-outline:hover { border-color: white; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.08); }
    .section { padding: 90px 24px; max-width: 1100px; margin: 0 auto; }
    .section-label { font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 2.5px; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--teal); margin-bottom: 12px; }
    .section-title { font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif; font-size: clamp(1.8rem, 4vw, 2.8rem); font-weight: 700; color: var(--navy); line-height: 1.2; }
    .services-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(280px, 1fr)); gap: 24px; margin-top: 48px; }
    .service-card { background: white; border-radius: 20px; padding: 32px 28px; box-shadow: 0 2px 20px rgba(13,35,64,0.06); border: 1px solid rgba(11,140,140,0.08); transition: transform 0.25s, box-shadow 0.25s; position: relative; overflow: hidden; }
    .service-card::after { content: ''; position: absolute; bottom: 0; left: 0; right: 0; height: 3px; background: linear-gradient(90deg, var(--teal), var(--teal-light)); transform: scaleX(0); transform-origin: left; transition: transform 0.3s; }
    .service-card:hover { transform: translateY(-5px); box-shadow: 0 12px 36px rgba(11,140,140,0.14); }
    .service-card:hover::after { transform: scaleX(1); }
    .service-icon { width: 52px; height: 52px; background: var(--light); border-radius: 14px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-size: 1.5rem; margin-bottom: 18px; }
    .service-card h3 { font-weight: 600; font-size: 1.1rem; color: var(--navy); }
    .service-card p { color: var(--gray); font-size: 0.9rem; margin-top: 8px; line-height: 1.6; }
    .treatments-bg { background: var(--light); padding: 90px 24px; }
    .treatments-inner { max-width: 1100px; margin: 0 auto; }
    .treatments-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(260px, 1fr)); gap: 24px; margin-top: 48px; }
    .treatment-card { background: white; border-radius: 20px; overflow: hidden; box-shadow: 0 2px 20px rgba(13,35,64,0.07); border: 1px solid rgba(11,140,140,0.08); transition: transform 0.25s, box-shadow 0.25s; }
    .treatment-card:hover { transform: translateY(-5px); box-shadow: 0 14px 36px rgba(11,140,140,0.15); }
    .treatment-img { width: 100%; height: 210px; object-fit: cover; object-position: center; display: block; }
    .treatment-body { padding: 22px 22px 24px; border-top: 3px solid var(--teal); }
    .treatment-body h3 { font-weight: 600; font-size: 1rem; color: var(--navy); }
    .treatment-body p { color: var(--gray); font-size: 0.88rem; margin-top: 6px; line-height: 1.55; }
    .reviews-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(260px, 1fr)); gap: 24px; margin-top: 48px; }
    .review-card { background: white; border-radius: 20px; padding: 28px 24px; box-shadow: 0 2px 20px rgba(13,35,64,0.06); }
    .stars { color: #f59e0b; font-size: 1rem; letter-spacing: 2px; }
    .review-text { color: var(--gray); font-size: 0.92rem; margin-top: 12px; line-height: 1.6; font-style: italic; }
    .reviewer { margin-top: 14px; font-weight: 600; font-size: 0.85rem; color: var(--navy); }
    .visit-section { background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--navy), #163d5c); padding: 80px 24px; text-align: center; }
    .visit-inner { max-width: 640px; margin: 0 auto; }
    .visit-section h2 { font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif; font-size: clamp(1.8rem, 4vw, 2.5rem); color: white; }
    .visit-section p { color: rgba(255,255,255,0.65); margin-top: 14px; font-size: 0.98rem; line-height: 1.6; }
    .visit-btns { display: flex; gap: 14px; justify-content: center; flex-wrap: wrap; margin-top: 32px; }
    .booking-banner { background: var(--teal); text-align: center; padding: 70px 24px; border-radius: 40px 40px 0 0; }
    .booking-banner h2 { font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif; font-size: clamp(1.8rem, 4vw, 2.5rem); color: white; }
    .booking-banner p { color: rgba(255,255,255,0.8); margin-top: 10px; font-size: 0.98rem; }
    .btn-white { display: inline-block; margin-top: 28px; background: white; color: var(--teal); padding: 14px 36px; border-radius: 50px; font-weight: 700; font-size: 0.95rem; text-decoration: none; transition: all 0.2s; }
    .btn-white:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: 0 8px 24px rgba(0,0,0,0.15); }
    footer { background: var(--navy); color: rgba(255,255,255,0.55); text-align: center; padding: 24px; font-size: 0.82rem; }
    footer span { color: var(--teal-light); }
    @keyframes fadeUp { from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(28px); } to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); } }
    @media (max-width: 640px) { nav { padding: 16px 20px; } .nav-links { display: none; } .hero-card { padding: 24px 20px; } }
  </style>
</head>
<body>

<nav>
  <div class="nav-logo">Vadsola <span>Dental</span></div>
  <ul class="nav-links">
    <li><a href="#services">Services</a></li>
    <li><a href="#treatments">Treatments</a></li>
    <li><a href="#reviews">Reviews</a></li>
    <li><a href="#visit">Visit Us</a></li>
  </ul>
  <a href="tel:09033634842" class="nav-cta">📞 Call Now</a>
</nav>

<section class="hero">
  <div style="position:relative;z-index:1;">
    <div class="hero-badge">✦ Trusted Dental Care, Mandvi</div>
    <h1>Healthy <span>Smiles</span>,<br/>Trusted Care</h1>
    <p class="hero-sub">Professional dental care for you and your entire family</p>
    <div class="hero-card">
      <h2>Dr. Niraj Patel</h2>
      <p>BDS — Vadsola Dental Clinic</p>
      <div class="contact-info">
        <div class="contact-chip">📍 1st Floor, Shivam Complex, Near Axis Bank, Vohra Hajira, Mandvi, Gujarat 370465</div>
        <div class="contact-chip">📞 090336 34842</div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="hero-btns">
      <a href="tel:09033634842" class="btn-primary">📞 Call Now</a>
      <a href="https://maps.google.com/?q=Vadsola+Dental+Clinic+Mandvi+Gujarat" target="_blank" class="btn-outline">🗺 Get Directions</a>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<div id="services">
  <div class="section">
    <div class="section-label">What We Offer</div>
    <h2 class="section-title">Our Core Services</h2>
    <div class="services-grid">
      <div class="service-card"><div class="service-icon">🦷</div><h3>General Dentistry</h3><p>Routine checkups, oral exams, and preventive care to maintain your long-term dental health.</p></div>
      <div class="service-card"><div class="service-icon">✨</div><h3>Teeth Whitening</h3><p>Advanced whitening treatments to brighten your smile and boost your confidence.</p></div>
      <div class="service-card"><div class="service-icon">🔩</div><h3>Dental Implants</h3><p>Modern, long-lasting solutions for missing teeth that look and feel completely natural.</p></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div id="treatments" class="treatments-bg">
  <div class="treatments-inner">
    <div class="section-label">Full Range</div>
    <h2 class="section-title">All Treatments</h2>
    <div class="treatments-grid">
      <div class="treatment-card">
        <img class="treatment-img" src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Professional Teeth Cleaning"/>
        <div class="treatment-body"><h3>Professional Teeth Cleaning</h3><p>Advanced cleaning and stain removal — see the before &amp; after difference for yourself.</p></div>
      </div>
      <div class="treatment-card">
        <img class="treatment-img" src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Dental Implants"/>
        <div class="treatment-body"><h3>Dental Implants &amp; Crowns</h3><p>Modern tooth replacement and restoration with natural-looking, long-lasting results.</p></div>
      </div>
      <div class="treatment-card">
        <img class="treatment-img" src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Braces and Alignment"/>
        <div class="treatment-body"><h3>Braces &amp; Alignment</h3><p>Metal, ceramic, clear, and lingual brace options to suit every patient's needs.</p></div>
      </div>
      <div class="treatment-card">
        <img class="treatment-img" src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Crowns and Bridges"/>
        <div class="treatment-body"><h3>Crowns &amp; Bridges</h3><p>Restore damaged or missing teeth with durable, beautifully crafted restorations.</p></div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div id="reviews">
  <div class="section">
    <div class="section-label">Patient Stories</div>
    <h2 class="section-title">What Our Patients Say</h2>
    <div class="reviews-grid">
      <div class="review-card"><div class="stars">★★★★★</div><p class="review-text">"Very nice experience, better treatment and valuable advice for future."</p><div class="reviewer">— Happy Patient</div></div>
      <div class="review-card"><div class="stars">★★★★★</div><p class="review-text">"One of the best dental clinics in Mandvi. Highly recommended to everyone."</p><div class="reviewer">— Local Resident</div></div>
      <div class="review-card"><div class="stars">★★★★★</div><p class="review-text">"Fantastic dentist! Painless treatment and a very friendly, professional team."</p><div class="reviewer">— Satisfied Patient</div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div id="visit" class="visit-section">
  <div class="visit-inner">
    <h2>Visit Us Today</h2>
    <p>Conveniently located near Axis Bank, Vohra Hajira, Mandvi, Gujarat 370465.<br/>We welcome walk-ins and appointments.</p>
    <div class="visit-btns">
      <a href="tel:09033634842" class="btn-primary">📞 090336 34842</a>
      <a href="https://maps.google.com/?q=Vadsola+Dental+Clinic+Mandvi+Gujarat" target="_blank" class="btn-outline">🗺 Get Directions</a>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="booking-banner">
  <h2>Book Your Appointment</h2>
  <p>Visit Vadsola Dental Clinic and keep your smile healthy and bright.</p>
  <a href="tel:09033634842" class="btn-white">Call to Book → 090336 34842</a>
</div>

<footer>
  <p>© 2025 <span>Vadsola Dental Clinic</span> — Dr. Niraj Patel, Mandvi, Gujarat 370465</p>
</footer>
</body>
</html>
